templates.name: 2D Platformer
templates.description: Classic side-scrolling platformer with player movement, jumping, collectibles, and enemies. Perfect for games like Mario or Celeste.
features: Player movement with coyote time and jump buffering

templates.name: Top-Down Shooter
templates.description: Action-packed top-down shooter with WASD movement, mouse aiming, and bullet mechanics. Great for games like Hotline Miami or Enter the Gungeon.
